items.title: Tenant-isolation audit of all services
items.description: Audit all 28 service files for missing distributorId filters; fix CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM findings. Done in commits b6f8c58, a0f855c, 8c758b2.

items.title: Tighten requireDistributor exemptions on /api/users, /api/billing, /api/pricing
items.description: Replaced req.query.distributorId fallback for super_admin with the validated X-Distributor-Id header pattern across billing, pricing, pendingActions, providerCatalog, and settings routes. Web client extended (apiGet { distributorIdOverride }) so super-admin views of other tenants still work via header. Commit aec783d.

items.title: Clean up ad-hoc test-*.ts scripts at packages/api/ root
items.description: Removed 10 scripts (check-users, test-debit-note, test-distance, test-e2e, test-e2e-v2/v3/v4, test-ewb, test-production-gst, test-whitebooks). All overlapped with the Vitest suite or were one-shot debug scripts.

items.title: Fix Bug #4 — credit-note button visible when gstMode=DISABLED
items.description: Wrapped CN/DN buttons on BillingPaymentsPage and InvoicesPage in {gstEnabled && (...)}. Both pages already computed gstEnabled from settings.gstMode but rendered the buttons unconditionally. Commit d1bb216.

items.title: Fix Bug #5 — vehicle field shown in assign-driver modal
items.description: Removed Vehicle <Select> from AssignDriverModal and BulkAssignDriverModal in OrdersPage. Vehicle is auto-resolved server-side from the day's driver-vehicle assignment. Commit d1bb216.

items.title: Migrate monetary fields from Float to Decimal
items.description: Done. All 35 monetary fields converted from Float (DOUBLE PRECISION) to Decimal (NUMERIC(18,4)) in packages/api/prisma/schema.prisma. Migration 20260506010000_monetary_fields_float_to_decimal applied via direct ALTER COLUMN ... USING ::NUMERIC(18,4) so existing data was preserved. Storage and SQL aggregates are now penny-perfect. Service-layer arithmetic still uses number via toNum() at read points (utils/decimal.ts) — pragmatic deviation from the original plan that called for full Prisma.Decimal arithmetic. Justification: the Decimal-everywhere refactor would have been ~10h of mechanical replacement with bug surface in every reduce/sum, so we converted only at the boundaries (storage + JSON serialization via decimalsToNumbers in mappers). This delivers the at-rest precision gain without the bug risk. The remaining TS-side rounding is bounded to 4 decimals via Decimal storage. Web client receives numbers as before — no frontend changes.

items.title: Verify GST live mode against WhiteBooks production
items.description: Founder must test against WhiteBooks production credentials — no code change needed. API tests cover sandbox only. Run a real IRN issuance + cancellation + EWB workflow against WhiteBooks production with production credentials; document the result in TESTING_PROGRESS.md before live tenants are onboarded.

items.title: Telugu i18n — build from scratch
items.description: 5 of 28 web pages done, mobile not started, protocol at .session/i18n-extraction-protocol.md. Foundation (i18next + en/te locale files + LanguageSwitcher in Sidebar). Done: LoginPage (e3b480d), customer/Dashboard (288d287), customer/Orders (4b50f18 + customerPortal.orders.viewModal.yourDriver merged today), customer/Invoices (97b64c2), customer/Payments (86ed73c). Plus enum namespaces for orderStatus, invoiceStatus, paymentMethod, paymentAllocationStatus. Remaining: 23 web pages + 5 components + all of mobile (55 routes + 7 components). Estimate 36-47h + native-speaker review pass.

items.title: Add graceful shutdown + unhandledRejection handlers to server.ts
items.description: Added unhandledRejection (log + Sentry, no exit), uncaughtException (log + Sentry + flush + exit 1), SIGTERM/SIGINT graceful shutdown (server.close() → prisma.$disconnect() → exit, 30s hard timeout). Commit 1add950.

items.title: Add web ErrorBoundary component
items.description: Class-based ErrorBoundary at packages/web/src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx wraps the entire app inside StrictMode in main.tsx. Recoverable fallback UI styled with Tailwind/Button primitives, dark-mode aware. Sentry hook ready (uses globalThis.Sentry when present + VITE_SENTRY_DSN). Commit 6d7afd9.

items.title: Disable source maps in vite.config.ts production build
items.description: vite.config.ts: build.sourcemap true → false. Commit 6d7afd9.

items.title: Upgrade axios to >=1.15.0 (CVE-2025-27152, CVE-2024-39338)
items.description: Bumped axios to ^1.15.0 in api, web, mobile. Lockfile regenerated, no peer-dependency conflicts. Commit 8c59594.

items.title: Verify distributor exists & is active in resolveDistributor middleware
items.description: middleware/auth.ts resolveDistributor is now async. After regex-validating the X-Distributor-Id header (or taking distributorId from JWT), looks up the distributor row and verifies status !== 'suspended'. Caches verified distributor on req.distributor. Commit aec783d.

items.title: Audit log super_admin tenant switches
items.description: Every successful super_admin X-Distributor-Id resolution emits a logBusinessEvent(super_admin_tenant_switch) with userId, distributorId, requestId, ip. Commit aec783d.

items.title: Fix PORT discrepancy in CLAUDE.md
items.description: CLAUDE.md said API runs on port 3000; actual is 5000 (config/index.ts default + .env.example). Updated CLAUDE.md. Also added missing env docs (SENTRY_DSN, VITE_API_URL, VITE_SENTRY_DSN, EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL) and created packages/web/.env.example and packages/mobile/.env.example. Commit 7a89001.

items.title: Integration test coverage expansion (Batch A: customers, payments, billing)
items.description: 34 new tests across customers.test.ts (13), payments.test.ts (9), billing.test.ts (12). Caught 3 bugs alongside (BillingStatus enum mismatch in shared, /ledger error handler, soft-delete leakage in getSeedData). Commit 6c7527a.

items.title: Integration test coverage expansion (Batch B: settings, drivers/vehicles, assignments, analytics)
items.description: 75 new tests across settings.test.ts (19), driversVehicles.test.ts (20), assignments.test.ts (10), analytics.test.ts (26). Commits be29a17, 2c2544a, c505aae, c4e3f29.

items.title: Integration test coverage expansion (Batch C: cylinderTypes, pricing, users, pendingActions)
items.description: 51 new tests across cylinderTypes.test.ts (13), pricing.test.ts (14), users.test.ts (13), pendingActions.test.ts (11). Commits 0aedee4, 4b104e0, 518aedc, 5b04ea1.

items.title: Pre-existing typecheck bugs in DistributorDetailPage / DistributorsPage (fixed)
items.description: DistributorDetailPage compared BillingStatus enum against 'paid_billing' / 'overdue_billing' (Prisma TS-side names) instead of 'paid' / 'overdue' (the @map'd values the API actually emits). DistributorsPage form defaults used '' for subscriptionPlan/billingTier instead of null. Comparisons would silently never match in production. Fixed alongside ErrorBoundary commit 6d7afd9.

items.title: Wire up @sentry/browser for the web ErrorBoundary
items.description: Installed @sentry/browser in packages/web. New packages/web/src/lib/sentry.ts exports initSentry() + the Sentry namespace. main.tsx calls initSentry() as the very first import (before React mount). ErrorBoundary now imports Sentry directly (no more globalThis pattern) and calls Sentry.captureException with React componentStack context. .env.example documents VITE_SENTRY_DSN + VITE_APP_VERSION. beforeSend drops events in dev so DSN can be set locally without sending noise. Source-map upload via @sentry/vite-plugin still pending (deferred until DSN is provisioned).

items.title: Merge worktree branch claude/peaceful-bartik-21e3d2 into master
items.description: Local merge with --no-ff, 30 commits brought into master. Resolved CLAUDE.md conflict by combining branch's web/api conventions + primary's mobile section. Merged .session/config.json schemas. Removed branch's generic spec.md in favour of primary's 7 specialized templates. ADLC v3 framework also installed via primary worktree commit b1ab3ad. Final master SHA: 32c943a. Tests still 254/254 passing on master.

items.title: Create GitHub repo and push master
items.description: Founder must create GitHub repo and run: git remote add origin <url> && git push -u origin master. Steps: (1) github.com new private repo named Re-New_Gaslink, do NOT init with README/.gitignore. (2) git remote add origin https://github.com/<user>/Re-New_Gaslink.git ; git branch -M master ; git push -u origin master. (3) Verify ci.yml triggers on push.

items.title: Manual smoke tests Phase 1 (55 cases, 7 roles)
items.description: Founder runs tomorrow using docs/MANUAL-TESTING-GUIDE.md. Replaces the older docs/Navigation_Smoke_Test.xlsx — the new guide is keyed to today's UI (role-aware dashboards, onboarding tab, offline delivery flow, customer portal driver contact).

items.title: Role-aware morning dashboard with collections call list
items.description: AnalyticsPage dashboard tab now renders role-specific morning briefings. distributor_admin/super_admin: stock position, today's dispatch, call list, metrics, pending actions. finance: call list, unallocated payments, GST failures. inventory: stock position, vehicles pending reconciliation, threshold alerts. driver: 'use mobile app' message. New endpoint: GET /api/analytics/overdue-call-list (analyticsService.getOverdueCallList). Commit 18d2a93.

items.title: Collections call list on Collections page
items.description: CollectionsPage now has a Call List / All Collections tab toggle. Reuses /analytics/overdue-call-list. Mobile-card layout for finance walking the floor. Commit 7fa6095.

items.title: Offline delivery confirmation queue + idempotent server
items.description: API: orderService.confirmDelivery is idempotent — duplicate confirm with same quantities returns 200 (no-op), mismatching quantities returns 409. Mobile: SecureStore-backed pending-deliveries queue, AppState 'active' auto-sync, network-vs-validation error discrimination, pending-sync badge on tab icon, per-order 'pending sync' state. Commit f05c6ba. Follow-up a1c6100: added @react-native-community/netinfo and startNetworkListener so the queue flushes the moment connectivity is restored, not just on app foreground.

items.title: Driver contact in customer portal order detail
items.description: customerPortalService flattens driverName + driverPhone onto orders. Phone gated by status: only exposed for pending_dispatch / pending_delivery (hidden once delivered or before assignment). Tenant isolation via existing customerId+distributorId filter. Commit 53d9dbe.

items.title: Onboarding checklist + CSV import for customers and opening balances
items.description: Settings → Onboarding tab with 6-step progress, CSV upload modals (template download, preview, per-row failure breakdown). New endpoints: POST /api/customers/import-csv, POST /api/customers/import-opening-balances, GET /api/customers/onboarding/progress, POST /api/customers/onboarding/dismiss. AnalyticsPage 'Get started' banner for incomplete setup. Initial commit 5ffdeac. Follow-ups: ed6516d switched opening-balance storage from PaymentTransaction to a synthetic overdue Invoice (isOpeningBalance flag, new migration 20260506000000_opening_balance_invoice_flag) so imported balances now appear in Collections, overdue-call-list, and customer portal automatically. 2e2278a added a dedicated 'Enter Opening Stock' modal driving a new POST /api/inventory/initial-balance endpoint so onboarding step 4 has a single-purpose UI rather than redirecting to the general inventory page.

items.title: Integration tests for new UX features
items.description: 11 new tests in src/__tests__/onboarding-and-imports.test.ts covering /import-csv (happy path, duplicate phone, tenant isolation), /import-opening-balances (happy path, unknown name failure, tenant isolation), /analytics/overdue-call-list (sort order, credit-period exclusion, tenant isolation), and /confirm-delivery idempotency (duplicate same-qty → 200, duplicate diff-qty → 409). Total suite: 265 tests passing.

items.title: Fix seed idempotency — convert creates to upserts
items.description: Re-running pnpm db:seed against a populated DB crashed on duplicate vehicle/driver/customer creates (P2002 on (distributor_id, vehicle_number) etc.). Approach taken: added bhargavaSeeded / sharmaSeeded gates that short-circuit each distributor's transactional block (customers, drivers, vehicles, orders, invoices, payments, inventory) when a cylinderPrice row already exists. Provider catalog, distributors, users, GST reference data, and pricing tiers already use upserts so they re-run idempotently. Sharma cylinder types upgraded to upsert too. Verified 2026-05-11: pnpm db:seed completed cleanly on an already-populated DB.

items.title: Fix Prisma migrate dev shadow DB failure
items.description: Root cause was worse than first thought: pricing_tiers, seat_requests, gst_api_usage, provider_catalog_cylinder_types and several enums (subscription_plan, seat_request_status) were added to schema.prisma but never captured in a migration — they only existed in dev DBs via `prisma db push`. There was also a BillingItemType vs billing_item_type naming drift. The migration history could not replay from empty at all (migrate reset failed on P3018). Fix: squashed the 5 drifted migration folders into a single regenerated baseline `20260323000000_init`, produced via `prisma migrate diff --from-empty --to-schema-datamodel`. Safe because no production DB exists yet (pre-launch) and CI builds fresh each run. Verified 2026-05-14: `prisma migrate reset --force` applies the single baseline cleanly, 265/265 API tests pass.

items.title: Fix seed.ts drivers/vehicles scoping after WI-032 refactor
items.description: The WI-032 idempotency refactor hoisted `customers` to outer scope but left `drivers` and `vehicles` as `const` inside the `if (!bhargavaSeeded)` block, while the Bhargava transactional section (orders/assignments) references them from its own separate `if` block. A full `pnpm db:seed` on an empty DB crashed at seed.ts:677 with `ReferenceError: drivers is not defined` — only surfaced now because pre-WI-032 the seed never re-ran on a clean DB. Fix: hoisted `drivers` and `vehicles` to outer-scope `let` declarations alongside `customers`. Verified 2026-05-14: full seed completes (11 orders, 4 invoices, 4 payments, 8 customer balances).

items.title: WI-A — Pre-dispatch preflight service (IRN + EWB before goods leave depot)
items.description: Implemented per founder Q1-Q4 directives. Per-order partial dispatch: succeeded orders → pending_delivery, failed → pending_dispatch + PendingAction (Q1). transDistance=0 lets NIC auto-calc from PIN codes (Q2). New preflight_in_progress OrderStatus value serves as a row-level lock; conditional UPDATE makes re-claim impossible (Q3). EWBS scope used standalone for B2C/URP, IRN-with-inline-EwbDtls for B2B (Q4). New endpoint POST /api/orders/preflight-dispatch returns 200/207/400/404/409. New gst_api_logs table captures every WhiteBooks call. Migration 20260515000000_preflight_and_gst_api_log. 25 new tests, suite 265 → 290 passing. Commits: 122d577 (schema), b14c35e (TranspDtls payload), 99cd082 (service), cce457d (route), 7c8ef7c (tests + date-parsing fixes). Spec: .session/specs/WI-A-predispatch-preflight.md. Session summary: .session/session-summary-WI-035.md. AMENDMENT 2026-05-15 (commit bf13215): removed the ₹50K B2C EWB threshold — every B2C/URP order now goes through the standalone EWB endpoint regardless of invoice value (founder directive: every dispatched vehicle must carry a compliance doc). One test rewritten to assert EWB IS generated for low-value B2C orders. Suite stays at 290/290.

items.title: WI-B — Dispatch UI: per-driver Dispatch button + preflight results screen
items.description: Driver Assignment tab now renders a Ready-to-Dispatch section after driver assignment. Each driver with pending_dispatch orders gets a card (driver name + vehicle + order count + total invoice value + Dispatch button). Dispatch click opens a progress modal that calls POST /api/orders/preflight-dispatch and displays per-order success/failure rows; full success exposes a Download Trip Sheet button hitting WI-038's endpoint. Status labels added: preflight_in_progress → 'Dispatching…' (blue), pending_delivery → 'Out for Delivery' (orange). assignmentService.vehicle-mappings response now surfaces assignmentId on confirmed rows so the trip-sheet URL builds without an extra round-trip. Verified live with sharma@gasdist.com + 1 order assigned to Kiran Reddy on KA01-MN-9999. Zero console errors. Commit: 61106d9. Spec: .session/specs/WI-036-dispatch-ui.md (local).

items.title: WI-C — Delivery-mismatch reissue (cancel + regenerate IRN/EWB on qty change)
items.description: When confirmDelivery writes delivered qty ≠ ordered qty AND the invoice carries a live IRN/EWB (from WI-035 preflight), the new gstReissueService runs: cancel EWB (MEDIUM PendingAction if it fails, continue) → cancel IRN B2B (HIGH PendingAction if it fails, abort) → recompute invoice item qty + totals → regenerate IRN B2B (with 2150 duplicate retry → bump invoiceNumber) or standalone EWB B2C → write audit row to new invoice_revisions table → set Invoice.revisedPostDeliveryAt. Reissue is fire-and-forget from confirmDelivery just like the existing processInvoiceGst path. Migration 20260515010000_invoice_revisions. 11 new tests in gst-reissue.test.ts. Suite: 290 → 302. Commit: e4afe38. Spec: .session/specs/WI-037-mismatch-reissue.md (local).

items.title: WI-D — Consolidated EWB (trip sheet) auto-generated on dispatch
items.description: Pre-dispatch preflight now calls WhiteBooks /gencewb when 2+ per-order EWBs are generated successfully, bundling them into a single consolidated EWB ('trip sheet'). tripSheetNo + tripSheetGeneratedAt persisted on DriverVehicleAssignment. New GET /api/orders/trip-sheet/:assignmentId returns a pdfkit-rendered A4 PDF with driver/vehicle/date, consolidated EWB at the top, table of orders (Order # | Customer | Address | EWB | Items | Value), and a legal-validity footer. Single-order drivers skip gencewb. gencewb failure does NOT block dispatch — LOW PendingAction CONSOLIDATED_EWB_FAILED is raised. The WI-036 dispatch modal Download Trip Sheet button now downloads through the shared axios client (per CLAUDE.md anti-pattern #5). Migration 20260515020000_trip_sheet_columns. 7 new tests in gst-trip-sheet.test.ts. Suite: 302 → 309. Verified live: PDF endpoint returns 200 application/pdf 3115 bytes with %PDF signature for a seeded tripSheetNo. Commit: a7f17dd. Spec: .session/specs/WI-038-trip-sheet.md (local). Note: regentripsheet wiring deferred — covered later if vehicle-change-mid-route becomes a real need.

items.title: WI-E — Credit Note / Debit Note IRN flow + UI exposure on Billing page
items.description: Backend CN/DN creation, approval, rejection, and IRN-on-approval were already wired (invoiceService.{approve,reject}{CreditNote,DebitNote} → processCreditNoteGst / processDebitNoteGst). This WI added the missing UI + endpoints: GET /api/invoices/:id/credit-notes (list), GET /api/invoices/:id/debit-notes (list), GET /api/invoices/debit-notes/:id/pdf (mirror of CN PDF), PUT .../reject now accepts an optional `reason` body captured in audit log, and the finance role added to /api/invoices/:id/cancel-irn + cancel-ewb. The View Invoice modal in BillingPaymentsPage (and InvoicesPage) gets a 'Credit / Debit Notes' expandable section showing each note's status badge, amount, reason, created-at, with Approve/Reject buttons on pending notes (admin only) and Download PDF on approved notes. Reject opens a modal with a required reason textarea (recorded in audit log; no column on the row). mappers.{mapCreditNote,mapDebitNote} normalize Prisma's enum suffix ('_cn'/'_dn') so the wire status matches the shared CreditNoteStatus/DebitNoteStatus enum the UI uses. Commits: 2469692. Test count: 327 → 332. Spec deviation: rejection reason captured in audit log only — no schema column yet.

items.title: WI-F — Customer GSTIN autofill on customer create/edit form
items.description: CustomersPage New/Edit modal gains a Fetch Details button under the GSTIN field. On click: validates 15-char format locally, calls GET /api/distributors/gstin-lookup/:gstin, autofills businessName, billingAddressLine1, billingCity, billingState, billingPincode from the NIC response. Surfaces an Active / cancelled status pill so admins see the GSTIN state before saving. Customer name + phone are deliberately preserved (NIC contact data is often stale). Commits: 0d299ce.

items.title: WI-G — EWB number in invoice PDF header (alongside GST Doc No)
items.description: drawHeader() in invoicePdfService now renders `EWB No: <number>` directly below `GST Doc No: <number>` when gstDoc.ewbNo is populated. Pure additive — header is unchanged when ewbNo is null (GST-disabled, EWB-failed, etc.). Existing e-Documents card at the bottom (with QR + validity dates) stays. Commits: 4eb6764.

items.title: WI-H — GST credentials management in Settings UI
items.description: Settings → GST tab replaced the single credentials form with two scoped credential cards (e-Invoice + e-Way Bill). Each card shows masked clientId, username, GSTIN, Valid/Not-validated pill, last-validated date, plus Test Connection and Update Credentials buttons. The Update modal collects clientId + clientSecret + username + password + GSTIN + email and submits to a new scoped Test & Save endpoint that authenticates against WhiteBooks before persisting (rolls back to isValid=false + returns 400 AUTH_FAILED with the NIC error message on failure). New endpoints: PUT /api/settings/gst/credentials/:scope (Test & Save), POST /api/settings/gst/credentials/:scope/test (Test only). gstCredentialsSchema in shared extended with optional password/email/scope. Commits: 5b1b426. Spec deviation: payload remains stored in plain DB columns — encryption at rest deferred to a separate WI per existing pattern.

items.title: WI-I — Open GSTIN lookup endpoint to distributor_admin role
items.description: GET /api/distributors/gstin-lookup/:gstin role gate widened from super_admin-only to super_admin + distributor_admin + finance + inventory so the customer-create flow (WI-040) and ad-hoc GSTIN validation can use it. Tenant isolation is irrelevant — GSTIN data is platform-level (NIC owns it). Per-tenant audit log entry is already covered by global audit middleware. Rate limiting deferred (NIC quota concerns are tracked separately). Commits: 0d299ce (bundled with WI-040).

items.title: Fix GET /api/settings response shape (DistributorSettings envelope)
items.description: Pre-existing contract mismatch — route returned raw DistributorSetting[] but every web consumer typed it as DistributorSettings object (gstMode + gstCredentials + cylinderThresholds + …). Surface: gstEnabled was silently false everywhere, so inline CN/DN icons, View Invoice modal's GST sections, and WI-039's new CN/DN section never rendered. Fixed by synthesizing the envelope server-side from the distributor row + einvoice credential + rawSettings[]. Surfaced + fixed during WI-039/042 UI verification. Commit: fa838f6.

items.title: Test Connection — bypass token cache, add NIC reachability probe
items.description: Old endpoint had two falsity modes: (1) in-memory token cache short-circuited /authenticate so a cached token reported OK even when WhiteBooks had deregistered the account; (2) it only checked auth, never NIC — yesterday's 5002 outage on IRN GENERATE returned green throughout. Reworked into a two-stage probe: clearTokenCache + getAuthToken (force fresh), then validateGstin on the distributor's own GSTIN to read NIC GSTNDETAILS. Response shape carries both `authenticated` and `nicReachable` booleans + authError/nicError strings. ewaybill scope mirrors auth into nicReachable since its /authenticate already hits NIC. UI renders two distinct ✅/❌ rows so admins can see which hop is broken. Spec: .session/specs/WI-054-test-connection-fix.md. Commit: 39e6a5f. +6 tests.

items.title: Amount-based Credit / Debit Note modal (drop items grid)
items.description: Finance teams almost always want to credit/debit a specific rupee amount, not reconstruct an items[] grid. Replaced the four-column form with Reason + Amount + Note. Shared createCreditNoteSchema / createDebitNoteSchema swapped items[] for `amount` (positiveNumber) + optional `note` (0-500). invoiceService enforces CN amount ≤ invoice.totalAmount with a clear 400; DN has no upper bound (surcharges legitimately exceed the original bill). Prisma migration 20260516000000_credit_debit_note_text_column adds nullable `note` columns; existing items-based rows in the DB remain readable. Also fixed a pre-existing URL bug: DebitNoteModal was POSTing to /debit-notes (404) instead of /invoices/debit-notes. Spec: .session/specs/WI-055-credit-note-modal-redesign.md. Commit: c6849c2. +7 tests.

items.title: Invoice list CN/DN count badges + CN PDF reads IRN from gst_documents
items.description: Two improvements bundled: (1) GET /api/invoices was shipping the full creditNotes[] + debitNotes[] arrays on every row — bandwidth waste plus no visual signal that CNs/DNs existed. Split the include into list (uses Prisma _count → numeric counts only) and detail (still full arrays for the View modal). Shared Invoice type gains creditNotesCount / debitNotesCount. Web renders small `CN N` / `DN N` pills next to the invoice number. (2) CN PDF's IRN block was dead code — gated on cnAny.irn / cnAny.ackNo / cnAny.signedQrCode, fields the CreditNote Prisma model never had. PDF generator now reads the latest CRN-type gst_documents row joined to the invoice (where processCreditNoteGst actually writes IRN data) and renders the existing CRN box from it. Spec: .session/specs/WI-056-cn-dn-badge-and-pdf.md. Commit: 4560a46. +6 tests.

items.title: Mobile — Driver smoke test + fixes
items.description: Smoke test driver flow on Android via Expo Go (raju@gasagency.com / Driver@123). Test all 4 tabs (Analytics, My Deliveries, Trip, Vehicle Stock). Verify offline delivery queue (turn Wi-Fi off, confirm a delivery, see 'pending sync' badge, turn Wi-Fi on, watch auto-sync). Fix any broken endpoints, field mismatches, or layout issues found. Reference: docs/MANUAL-TESTING-GUIDE.md SESSION 9. Driver flow is the most polished mobile path (95% per ARCHITECTURE §21) so expect minor bugs only.

items.title: Mobile — Distributor Admin smoke test + fixes
items.description: Smoke test admin mobile (sharma@gasdist.com / Gstadmin@123 for GST flows; bhargava@gasagency.com / Distadmin@123 for non-GST). Test orders, dispatch, inventory, finance screens. Fix the known TODO at packages/mobile/app/(admin)/finance.tsx:496 (PDF download not wired). Audit the 1976-line more.tsx and 1783-line orders.tsx for endpoint drift vs current API contract. Reference: docs/MANUAL-TESTING-GUIDE.md SESSION 10.

items.title: Mobile — Inventory smoke test + fixes
items.description: Smoke test inventory role on mobile (inventory@gasagency.com / Inventory@123). Test summary, actions (incoming fulls / outgoing empties / manual adjustment), reconciliation, alerts, fleet screens. The 809-line inventory.tsx with 4-tab inner navigation is the largest single mobile screen and the highest-risk audit target. Reference: docs/MANUAL-TESTING-GUIDE.md SESSION 12.

items.title: Mobile — Customer app smoke test + fixes
items.description: Smoke test customer portal on mobile (royal@kitchen.com / Customer@123). Test dashboard, orders (list + place new), invoices (list + download), payments (list + record), account screens. Verify customer can ONLY see Royal Kitchen's data (tenant isolation). Reference: docs/MANUAL-TESTING-GUIDE.md SESSION 11.

items.title: Mobile — Finance smoke test + fixes
items.description: Smoke test finance role on mobile (finance@gasagency.com / Finance@123). Test dashboard, payments (record payment, allocations), invoices (view + download), collections. Lower priority because finance staff usually work from web — mobile is a complement, not the primary surface. Reference: docs/MANUAL-TESTING-GUIDE.md SESSION 13.

items.title: Mobile — Super Admin smoke test + fixes
items.description: Smoke test super admin on mobile (admin@mygaslink.com / Admin@123). 12 screens — broadest surface, but lowest priority because super_admin is internal-only. Most super_admin work happens on web. Verify cold-launch routing lands on (super-admin)/dashboard.

items.title: Mobile — Add role guards to layout files
items.description: Each role _layout.tsx (admin/customer/driver/finance/inventory/super-admin) must verify user.role matches the group on mount and redirect to /(auth)/login (or the user's correct role group) if mismatch. Currently only app/index.tsx checks role on COLD LAUNCH — once the user is in the app, deep-linking or a stale navigation state can land them on a screen that looks empty (the API rejects all calls 403). Defense-in-depth, not the primary security control (the API gate is still authoritative). Estimate ~15 LOC per layout × 6 = ~90 LOC. Pattern: useAuthStore + useRouter + Redirect on mismatch.

items.title: Mobile — Setup guide + env config
items.description: Document EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL setup for phone testing. API binds to 0.0.0.0 in dev (FIX B of WI-053) so phones on the same Wi-Fi can reach it. Added .env.local.example with filled-in instructions, expanded .env.example with the LAN-IP discovery commands per OS, and added SESSION 9 (Mobile Setup) to docs/MANUAL-TESTING-GUIDE.md. WI-045 → WI-050 all depend on this being done before someone can scan the QR. Commits to come on this branch.

items.title: Mobile — Security hardening pre-pilot
items.description: Five-part hardening pass before any user pilot. (1) Rate limiting on auth endpoints — DONE 2026-05-16: refreshLimiter added next to existing loginLimiter / forgotPasswordLimiter, all three windowed at 15 min with prod-strict / dev-relaxed counts (packages/api/src/routes/auth.ts). (2) HTTPS in production eas.json — VERIFIED: preview + production both use https://api.mygaslink.com/api. (3) 0.0.0.0 binding gated to dev only — DONE 2026-05-16: server.ts now binds 127.0.0.1 in production, 0.0.0.0 in dev, overridable via HOST env var. (4) SSL pinning — PENDING, requires production cert chain to be settled; documented as full-launch requirement in CLAUDE.md mobile rules and ARCHITECTURE §22. (5) Client-side role guards — tracked separately as WI-051 (P1, doesn't block this WI's pilot-level closure). This WI flips to 'done' once the pilot decision sign-off accepts SSL-pinning and role-guards as post-pilot work.
